_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL - PTERODACTYL FORK
name: TS-Website
author: admin@example.com
description: A feature-rich website for your TeamSpeak 3 server. Includes news page, dynamic server status, server viewer, group assigner, ban list, rules, FAQ and more. Built with PHP and MySQL. Original project by Wruczek: https://github.com/Wruczek/ts-website
startup: [ -d /home/container/public ] || (cd /home/container && wget -q $(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/Wruczek/ts-website/releases/latest | grep 'browser_download_url.*zip' | cut -d '"' -f 4) -O ts-website.zip && unzip -q ts-website.zip && mv ts-website/* . && rmdir ts-website && rm ts-website.zip); php -S 0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}} -t /home/container/public /home/container/public/index.php

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# TS-Website Installer
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl wget unzip php7.4 php7.4-mbstring php7.4-json php7.4-mysql php7.4-curl php7.4-pdo php7.4-cli

cd /mnt/server

# Download latest release
echo "Fetching latest ts-website release..."
LATEST_URL=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/Wruczek/ts-website/releases/latest | grep 'browser_download_url.*zip' | cut -d '"' -f 4)

if [ -z "$LATEST_URL" ]; then
  echo "Could not fetch latest release URL. Falling back to direct download."
  wget -q https://github.com/Wruczek/ts-website/archive/refs/heads/2.0.zip -O ts-website.zip
  unzip -q ts-website.zip
  mv ts-website-2.0/* .
  rmdir ts-website-2.0
else
  wget -q "$LATEST_URL" -O ts-website.zip
  unzip -q ts-website.zip
  # Move files if extracted into a subfolder
  if [ -d "ts-website" ]; then
    mv ts-website/* .
    rmdir ts-website
  fi
fi

rm -f ts-website.zip

# Set permissions
chown -R container:container /mnt/server
chmod -R 755 /mnt/server

echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port the PHP built-in web server will listen on.

variables.name: TeamSpeak Host
variables.description: The IP address or hostname of your TeamSpeak 3 server.

variables.name: TeamSpeak Server Port
variables.description: The voice port of your TeamSpeak 3 server (default: 9987).

variables.name: TeamSpeak Query Port
variables.description: The ServerQuery (raw query) port of your TeamSpeak 3 server (default: 10011).

variables.name: TeamSpeak Query Password
variables.description: The ServerQuery password for your TeamSpeak 3 server.

variables.name: MySQL Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP address of the MySQL/MariaDB server.

variables.name: MySQL Database Name
variables.description: Name of the MySQL database to use for ts-website.

variables.name: MySQL Username
variables.description: Username for connecting to the MySQL database.

variables.name: MySQL Password
variables.description: Password for the MySQL database user.

variables.name: Display IP / Domain
variables.description: The IP or domain shown to users for connecting to your TeamSpeak server (e.g. ts.example.com).
